name: BuilderSync
description: Free open-source live multiplayer level editor for Geometry Dash.

server-url.name: Relay Server URL
server-url.description: WebSocket relay server to connect to. Change this to self-host.

username.name: Display Name
username.description: Your name shown to other collaborators.

cursor-sync.name: Sync Cursor
cursor-sync.description: Show other players' cursors in the editor.

show-notifications.name: Join/Leave Notifications
show-notifications.description: Show toast when a player joins or leaves.
